de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class TacletIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex

  • public abstract class TacletIndex
extends java.lang.Object
    manages all applicable Taclets (more precisely: Taclets with instantiations but without position information, the NoPosTacletApps) at one node. It is a persistent implementation. Taclets can be added because the Taclets allow to introduce new rules during runtime. It offers selective get methods for different kinds of rules.

      contains NoFind-Taclets
      protected java.util.HashSet<NoPosTacletApp> partialInstantiatedRuleApps
      keeps track of no pos taclet apps with partial instantiations
      protected java.util.HashMap<java.lang.Object,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> rwList
      contains rewrite Taclets
      protected java.util.HashMap<java.lang.Object,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> succList
      contains succedent Taclets

      • add

        public void add(Taclet taclet)
        adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index. If rule instance is not known rule is not added
        Parameters:
        taclet - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be added

      • add

        public void add(NoPosTacletApp tacletApp)
        adds a new Taclet with instantiation information to this index. If rule instance is not known rule is not added
        Parameters:
        tacletApp - the Taclet and its instantiation info to be added

      • matchTaclets

        protected abstract ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> matchTaclets(ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> tacletApps,
                                                              RuleFilter p_filter,
                                                              PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                              Services services)
        Filter the given list of taclet apps, and match their find parts at the given position of the sequent

      • getAntecedentTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getAntecedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                         RuleFilter filter,
                                                         Services services)
        get all Taclets for the antecedent.
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosOfOccurrence describing the formula for which to look for top level taclets
        filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

      • getSuccedentTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getSuccedentTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                        RuleFilter filter,
                                                        Services services)
        get all Taclets for the succedent.
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosOfOccurrence describing the formula for which to look for top level taclets
        filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

      • getRewriteTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getRewriteTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                      RuleFilter filter,
                                                      Services services)
        get all Rewrite-Taclets.
        Parameters:
        filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        IList containing all applicable rules and the corresponding instantiations to get the rule fit.

      • getNoFindTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getNoFindTaclet(RuleFilter filter,
                                                     Services services)
        get all Taclets having no find expression.
        Parameters:
        filter - Only return taclets the filter selects
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        IList containing all applicable rules and an empty part for the instantiations because no instantiations are necessary.

      • lookup

        public NoPosTacletApp lookup(Name name)
        returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
        Parameters:
        name - the name to lookup
        Returns:
        the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there

      • lookup

        public NoPosTacletApp lookup(java.lang.String name)
        returns a NoPosTacletApp whose Taclet has a name that equals the given name. If more Taclets have the same name an arbitrary Taclet with that name is returned.
        Parameters:
        name - the name to lookup
        Returns:
        the found NoPosTacletApp or null if no matching Taclet is there

      • getPartialInstantiatedApps

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getPartialInstantiatedApps()
        returns a list with all partial instantiated no pos taclet apps
        Returns:
        list with all partial instantiated NoPosTacletApps
